headline: Union Pacific Corporation Declares Second Quarter 2026 Dividend
summary: OMAHA, Neb., May 14, 2026--The Board of Directors of Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE: UNP) has declared a quarterly dividend of $1.38 per share on the company’s common stock, payable June 30, 2026, to shareholders of record May 29, 2026.

headline: 3 Railroad Stocks to Watch From the Challenging Industry
summary: Headwinds, including high fuel costs, tariff-related tensions, and lingering supply-chain disruptions, hurt the Zacks Transportation -Railroad industry. UNP, CSX and CP are likely to stand out.

headline: Union Pacific Corporation CEO Jim Vena to Address the RBC Canadian Industrials Conference
summary: OMAHA, Neb., May 14, 2026--Jim Vena, chief executive officer of Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE: UNP) will address the RBC Canadian Industrials Conference on Thursday, May 21, 2026, at 12:00 p.m. ET.

headline: Union Pacific Stock Outlook: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish?
summary: Union Pacific has underperformed the broader market over the past year, but analysts are cautiously optimistic about the stock’s prospects.
